.gitignore: Version control ignore configuration specifying directories and files to exclude from Git tracking across server, client, and root project levels.
fileDescriptions.json: Centralized JSON configuration for storing and managing file documentation descriptions across the project.
package.json: Root package.json for QuickPay project, managing monorepo scripts for client and server installation, development, and concurrent startup with concurrently.
client/components.json: Configuration schema for Shadcn UI library, defining project structure, styling preferences, and component alias mappings for a React application.
client/eslint.config.js: ESLint configuration for TypeScript React project, setting up recommended rules, browser globals, and React-specific linting for TypeScript and TSX files.
client/index.html: Entry point HTML file for Scan&Pay web application, configuring page metadata, favicon, and loading the main React application script.
client/package.json: Vite client project configuration with React, Radix UI, and Tailwind CSS dependencies, defining scripts, project metadata, and development toolchain.
client/postcss.config.js: PostCSS configuration file setting up Tailwind CSS and autoprefixer plugins for style processing and cross-browser compatibility.
client/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining DM Sans typography, dark mode support, custom color palette with HSL variables for UI components (primary, secondary, accent, destructive, sidebar), border radius utilities, accordion animations, and chart colors.
client/tsconfig.app.json: TypeScript configuration file for the client application, specifying compiler options, module resolution, strict type checking, and source directory inclusion.
client/tsconfig.json: TypeScript configuration file for the client project, defining project references, base URL, and module path aliases for import resolution.
client/tsconfig.node.json: TypeScript configuration for Node.js build process, defining strict compiler options and build settings for Vite project with ES module support.
client/vite.config.ts: Vite configuration file for React client, setting up development server proxies, path aliases, and build plugins with custom server settings.
client/src/App.css: Global CSS stylesheet for the application, providing root layout, logo styling, responsive animations, and basic component styling with media query support.
client/src/App.tsx: Root application routing configuration with nested routes for homepage, payment, restaurant authentication, and dashboard pages, wrapped in theme and toast providers.
client/src/index.css: Global stylesheet with Tailwind CSS integration, design system CSS variables for light/dark themes, custom animations (underlines, heartbeat, QR scan, wave effects), glassmorphism card styles, and accessibility features including reduced motion preferences.
client/src/main.tsx: React application entry point, rendering the main App component within StrictMode and initializing the root DOM element.
client/src/vite-env.d.ts: TypeScript declaration file for Vite environment, providing type references and configuration for client-side development.
client/src/api/api.ts: Axios-based API utility module with token management, custom request interceptors, and wrapper methods for HTTP requests (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) with JSON BigInt parsing support.
client/src/api/auth.ts: Authentication API utility functions for restaurant user registration, login, logout, and profile retrieval with error handling and token management.
client/src/api/bills.ts: API utility function for retrieving restaurant bill details by restaurant ID and table number, with mock data implementation and commented-out actual API call.
client/src/api/payments.ts: Payment processing API function for restaurant orders, handling transaction details with mock response and potential API integration.
client/src/api/receipts.ts: API utility function for sending payment receipts via email, providing a mock implementation with a simulated asynchronous response.
client/src/api/restaurant.ts: Restaurant API utility functions for managing restaurant data, including CRUD operations, dashboard retrieval, QR code generation, and settings updates.
client/src/components/Footer.tsx: Reusable Footer component with configurable background and optional content display, supporting dynamic styling and copyright information for Scan&Pay application.
client/src/components/Header.tsx: Header component with logo and navigation, rendering a fixed top bar with a QR code icon and "Scan&Pay" title that navigates to the home page when clicked.
client/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component managing page structure with dynamic header, main content area, and footer, adapting background and visibility based on current route.
client/src/components/StarRating.tsx: Reusable star rating component with configurable size, animation, and dynamic rating display using Lucide React icons and Tailwind CSS classes.
client/src/components/TypingEndOfWaiting: React component implementing a typewriter effect for "The End of Waiting" text, featuring an animated message and a call-to-action button that navigates to a demo payment page.
client/src/components/payment/BillReview: Interactive bill review component for restaurant orders, allowing item selection, quantity adjustment, and displaying subtotal with dynamic UI rendering based on user interactions.
client/src/components/payment/PaymentMet: React component that displays available payment methods (Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, AirCash) and handles payment processing with order summary, supporting item selection validation, payment creation/confirmation via API, and success/error notifications.
client/src/components/payment/TipSelecti: React component for tip selection with predefined percentages and custom amount input, allowing users to choose and calculate tips based on subtotal.
client/src/components/ui/accordion.tsx: Radix UI-based Accordion component with customizable trigger, content, and item subcomponents, providing an accessible and animated expandable/collapsible interface.
client/src/components/ui/alert-dialog.ts: Radix UI-based Alert Dialog component with customizable subcomponents for creating responsive and accessible confirmation/warning modal interfaces in React.
client/src/components/ui/alert.tsx: Reusable Alert component with customizable variants, supporting title and description, built using React and class-variance-authority for flexible styling.
client/src/components/ui/aspect-ratio.ts: Radix UI AspectRatio wrapper component for maintaining consistent media and container proportions in responsive designs.
client/src/components/ui/avatar.tsx: Radix UI-based Avatar component with customizable image and fallback states, providing a flexible and accessible user profile image display mechanism.
client/src/components/ui/badge.tsx: Reusable Badge component with configurable variants using class-variance-authority, supporting default, secondary, destructive, and outline styles with dynamic styling and accessibility features.
client/src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx: Reusable, accessible Breadcrumb component library with composable sub-components for navigation, supporting custom separators, links, and ellipsis states with Radix UI and Tailwind styling.
client/src/components/ui/button.tsx: Reusable Button component with configurable variants and sizes, leveraging class-variance-authority for dynamic styling and supporting custom child rendering.
client/src/components/ui/calendar.tsx: Customizable calendar component using react-day-picker with responsive design, navigation controls, and flexible styling options for date selection and range picking.
client/src/components/ui/card.tsx: Reusable Card component library with composable subcomponents (Header, Title, Description, Content, Footer) for creating flexible and styled card interfaces in React.
client/src/components/ui/carousel.tsx: Reusable carousel component with Embla Carousel, supporting horizontal and vertical orientations, with customizable navigation buttons and slide management.
client/src/components/ui/chart.tsx: Reusable chart component library with Recharts integration, providing customizable chart containers, tooltips, legends, and theming support for React applications.
client/src/components/ui/checkbox.tsx: Radix UI-based Checkbox component with customizable styling, accessibility features, and a check indicator using Lucide React icon.
client/src/components/ui/collapsible.tsx: Radix UI Collapsible component wrapper, exporting Root, Trigger, and Content components for creating expandable/collapsible UI elements.
client/src/components/ui/command.tsx: Reusable command palette component library built with cmdk, providing composable UI elements for search, navigation, and interactive command interfaces with customizable styling and accessibility.
client/src/components/ui/context-menu.ts: Radix UI-based context menu component library with customizable subcomponents for creating flexible and accessible context menus in React applications.
client/src/components/ui/dialog.tsx: Radix UI-based Dialog component with customizable overlay, content, header, footer, title, and description, providing a flexible and accessible modal dialog system for React applications.
client/src/components/ui/drawer.tsx: Reusable drawer component library using Vaul, providing composable UI elements like trigger, content, header, footer, title, and description with customizable styling and accessibility.
client/src/components/ui/dropdown-menu.t: Radix UI-based dropdown menu component library with comprehensive subcomponents for creating flexible, accessible, and customizable dropdown menus in React applications.
client/src/components/ui/form.tsx: Reusable form component library with React Hook Form integration, providing composable and accessible form elements like FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormDescription, and FormMessage.
client/src/components/ui/hover-card.tsx: Radix UI-based hover card component with customizable content positioning, styling, and animation for creating interactive hover information displays.
client/src/components/ui/input-otp.tsx: Reusable one-time password (OTP) input component with customizable slots, group, and separator, providing an interactive and accessible input experience for multi-digit verification codes.
client/src/components/ui/input.tsx: Reusable input component with responsive styling, accessibility features, and dynamic class composition using the cn utility function.
client/src/components/ui/label.tsx: Radix UI Label component with customizable styling using class-variance-authority, providing accessible and responsive label rendering with disabled state support.
client/src/components/ui/loading-spinner: Reusable loading spinner component with configurable sizes, rendering an animated circular loader with customizable styling and responsive dimensions.
client/src/components/ui/menubar.tsx: Radix UI-based Menubar component library with comprehensive subcomponents for creating accessible, customizable dropdown menus with keyboard navigation and styling support.
client/src/components/ui/navigation-menu: Radix UI-based navigation menu component with customizable trigger, content, and viewport, providing a flexible and animated navigation interface for React applications.
client/src/components/ui/pagination.tsx: Reusable pagination component library with composable subcomponents for creating flexible and accessible navigation controls, exporting Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext, and PaginationEllipsis.
client/src/components/ui/popover.tsx: Radix UI Popover component with customizable positioning, styling, and animation for creating interactive floating content containers in React applications.
client/src/components/ui/progress.tsx: Radix UI-based Progress component with customizable styling and dynamic width indicator for tracking progress visually.
client/src/components/ui/radio-group.tsx: Radix UI-based radio group component with customizable styling, exporting RadioGroup and RadioGroupItem for creating accessible and themeable radio button interfaces.
client/src/components/ui/resizable.tsx: Resizable panel components using react-resizable-panels, providing customizable panel groups with optional drag handles for horizontal and vertical resizing.
client/src/components/ui/scroll-area.tsx: Radix UI-based ScrollArea component with customizable vertical and horizontal scrollbars, providing a flexible and styled scrolling container for React applications.
client/src/components/ui/select.tsx: Radix UI-based Select component library with customizable trigger, content, items, and scrolling buttons, providing a flexible and accessible dropdown selection interface.
client/src/components/ui/separator.tsx: Radix UI Separator component with configurable orientation and styling, providing a flexible horizontal or vertical divider for UI layouts.
client/src/components/ui/sheet.tsx: Radix UI-based sheet (slide-out panel) component with configurable positioning, styling, and accessibility features for creating responsive side drawers or modal panels.
client/src/components/ui/sidebar.tsx: Comprehensive React sidebar component library with responsive design, mobile support, context management, and multiple sub-components for creating flexible and interactive navigation interfaces.
client/src/components/ui/skeleton.tsx: Reusable Skeleton loading component with animated pulse effect, providing a lightweight placeholder for content rendering.
client/src/components/ui/slider.tsx: Radix UI-based Slider component with customizable styling, supporting touch interactions and accessibility features for range selection.
client/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx: Customizable toast notification component with theme support, utilizing Sonner library and next-themes for dynamic styling and rendering.
client/src/components/ui/switch.tsx: Radix UI-based Switch component with customizable styling, supporting checked/unchecked states and accessibility features.
client/src/components/ui/table.tsx: Reusable, composable React table component library with customizable subcomponents like Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, and TableCell, utilizing Tailwind CSS for styling and supporting advanced interactions and accessibility.
client/src/components/ui/tabs.tsx: Radix UI-based Tabs component with customizable list, trigger, and content elements, providing a flexible and accessible tabbed interface with styling and interaction support.
client/src/components/ui/textarea.tsx: Shadcn-inspired reusable Textarea component with responsive styling, accessibility features, and customizable class names using Tailwind CSS.
React theme management context provider with system, light, and dark mode support, handling theme persistence in local storage and providing a custom useTheme hook for theme state management.
client/src/components/ui/theme-toggle.ts: React component for theme toggling between light and dark modes, using state management and dynamic icon rendering with Lucide icons.
client/src/components/ui/toast.tsx: Radix UI toast component library with customizable variants, providing a comprehensive set of composable toast-related components for displaying notifications with flexible styling and interaction.
client/src/components/ui/toaster.tsx: Global toast notification component rendering dynamic toast messages with error logging and customizable content using Radix UI toast primitives.
client/src/components/ui/toggle-group.ts: Radix UI-based toggle group component with customizable variants and sizing, providing a flexible and accessible way to create grouped toggle interactions.
client/src/components/ui/toggle.tsx: Radix UI Toggle component with customizable variants and sizes, implementing responsive styling and accessibility through class-variance-authority and Tailwind CSS.
client/src/components/ui/tooltip.tsx: Radix UI-based tooltip component with customizable content, trigger, and provider for creating animated and styled tooltips in React applications.
client/src/hooks/useMobile.tsx: React hook for detecting mobile screen width, providing a boolean flag based on a 768px breakpoint.
client/src/hooks/useToast.ts: Custom React hook for managing toast notifications with state management, supporting adding, updating, dismissing, and removing toasts with a configurable limit and automatic timeout.
client/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function for merging Tailwind CSS classes using clsx and tailwind-merge, enabling dynamic and conditional class composition.
client/src/pages/BlankPage.tsx: Placeholder page component displaying a "Under Construction" card with a back-to-home button, used for unimplemented routes in the application.
client/src/pages/DashboardDemo.tsx: Demo dashboard component displaying restaurant performance metrics including KPI cards for revenue and tips, recent transactions list, and active tables status with real-time clock and animated Framer Motion transitions.
client/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page component showcasing Scan&Pay's payment solution with animated hero section, feature benefits, FAQ accordion, impact cards, and call-to-action sections using Framer Motion scroll animations and Intersection Observer hooks.
client/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Payment processing page that fetches and displays bill details by restaurant and table ID, allowing customers to select items, adjust quantities, add tips, and proceed to payment via BillReview, TipSelection, and PaymentMethods components.
client/src/pages/RestaurantDashboard.tsx: Restaurant management dashboard displaying real-time revenue analytics, transaction history, and monthly performance metrics with filtering capabilities, featuring overview, monthly analysis, and transaction tabs with live clock updates and authentication checks.
client/src/pages/RestaurantLogin.tsx: Restaurant login page component with email/password authentication, form validation, loading states, and navigation to dashboard upon successful login with token and restaurant data storage.
client/src/pages/RestaurantManagement.ts: Restaurant management page with CRUD operations, allowing users to create, view, edit, and delete restaurant details through interactive dialogs and a responsive grid layout.
client/src/pages/RestaurantRegister.tsx: Restaurant registration page component with form validation, user authentication, and local storage management for restaurant account creation in the Scan&Pay system.
client/src/pages/RestaurantSettings.tsx: Restaurant settings management page with Stripe Connect payment processing setup, restaurant configuration (name and table count), and QR code generation and download functionality for table-specific payment links.
client/src/pages/SuccessPage.tsx: Success page component displaying payment confirmation with animated UI, payment details from URL parameters, and email receipt functionality with validation.
server/.env: Environment configuration file for server, defining port, database connection, and JWT authentication secrets.
server/package.json: Node.js server package configuration with Express framework, MongoDB integration via Mongoose, authentication (JWT, bcrypt, sessions), AI integrations (Anthropic, OpenAI), payment processing (Stripe), and utility libraries for email, QR codes, and CSV export.
server/server.js: Express server entry point with MongoDB connection, session management, and route handlers for authentication, restaurants, bills, payments, Stripe integration, QR codes, receipts, and dashboard functionality.
server/config/database.js: MongoDB connection utility that establishes a database connection using Mongoose, handling connection success and error scenarios with logging.
server/models/Restaurant.js: Mongoose schema and model for Restaurant documents, defining restaurant details, address fields, contact information, table capacity, owner reference, and Stripe payment integration status with automatic timestamp updates.
server/models/User.js: Mongoose User model for restaurant management, defining user schema with email, password, restaurant details, and password hashing middleware for secure authentication.
server/routes/authRoutes.js: Express router for authentication endpoints handling user registration, login, logout, and token validation with JWT-based authentication and restaurant association.
server/routes/index.js: Express router configuration handling root and health check routes with welcome and ping endpoints.
server/routes/restaurantRoutes.js: Express router for restaurant management, providing authenticated CRUD endpoints for creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting restaurant records with owner-based access control.
server/routes/middleware/auth.js: JWT authentication middleware for validating user tokens, extracting user information, and protecting routes with secure access control.
server/scripts/seedRestaurants.js: Database seeding script for populating Restaurant collection with sample restaurant data, creating a test user if needed and inserting predefined restaurant entries.
server/scripts/testRestaurantAPI.js: Comprehensive test script for Restaurant API, executing end-to-end tests including user registration, restaurant creation, retrieval, update, and deletion with detailed logging and result tracking.
server/services/authService.js: Authentication service handling user registration and login with JWT token generation, User and Restaurant model creation/retrieval, and password validation.
server/services/llmService.js: LLM service module for sending requests to OpenAI and Anthropic, with retry mechanism and error handling for generating AI responses.
server/services/restaurantService.js: Restaurant service module providing CRUD operations for restaurant management with owner authorization, supporting soft and hard deletion strategies.
server/utils/jwt.js: JWT utility functions for generating and verifying authentication tokens with a 7-day expiration using JSON Web Token standard.
server/models/Bill.js: Mongoose schema for restaurant bills, defining bill structure with items, payments, status tracking, and methods for calculating totals, remaining amounts, and bill status.
server/routes/billRoutes.js: Express router for bill management endpoints, providing CRUD operations and filtering capabilities with authentication middleware for creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting bills by restaurant and table.
server/scripts/seedBills.js: Database seeding script for generating test bills, creating a test user and restaurant, and populating sample bill data with various scenarios and payment statuses.
server/scripts/testBillAPI.js: Comprehensive end-to-end test script for Bill API, covering user registration, restaurant creation, bill management, and validating bill creation, retrieval, update, payment, and deletion workflows with detailed test logging and result tracking.
server/services/billService.js: Service module for bill management operations, exporting functions to create, retrieve, update, and delete bills with support for payment tracking, item-level paid status, demo mode, and ownership verification.
client/src/api/stripe.ts: Stripe Connect API utility functions for restaurant onboarding, account status verification, dashboard access, and balance retrieval. Exports startStripeOnboarding, checkStripeStatus, getStripeDashboardLink, and getStripeBalance.
server/models/Payment.js: Mongoose schema for payment transactions, managing bill payments with Stripe integration, supporting multiple payment methods, tip calculations, platform fees, and payment status tracking with indexed queries for bills and restaurants.
server/routes/paymentRoutes.js: Express router for payment processing endpoints, handling payment creation, confirmation, retrieval, refunds, and restaurant statistics via Stripe integration with paymentService.
server/routes/stripeRoutes.js: Express routes for Stripe Connect integration, providing endpoints to initiate restaurant onboarding, check account status, access Express dashboard, and retrieve account balance.
server/scripts/testStripeIntegration.js: Test script for Stripe Connect integration that validates user registration, profile retrieval, and onboarding flow by creating a test user and checking account status at each step.
server/services/paymentService.js: Payment processing service handling Stripe integration for bill payments, including payment creation, confirmation, refunds, and statistics; exports createPayment, confirmPayment, getPaymentById, getPaymentByIntentId, getRestaurantPayments, refundPayment, and getPaymentStatistics functions with support for demo and test modes.
server/services/stripeService.js: Stripe payment processing service providing functions for restaurant account onboarding, payment intent management, refunds, and balance retrieval via Stripe Connect API.
server/scripts/createTestBill.js: Node.js CLI script that seeds the database with a test bill containing sample menu items for a restaurant table, enabling payment flow testing.
server/scripts/verifyBill.js: Database verification script that connects to MongoDB and queries bills for table 1, displaying bill details including restaurant information, status, total amount, and item count.
server/scripts/createTestBillTable2.js: Database seeding script that creates a test bill with multiple food and beverage items for table 2 in the most recent restaurant, enabling payment flow testing.
server/scripts/createTestBillTable3.js: Database seeding script that creates a test bill for table 3 with sample menu items, connecting to the database and linking the bill to the most recent restaurant.
server/scripts/createTestBillTable4.js: Database seeding script that creates a test bill for table 4 with sample menu items, connecting to the database and logging bill details for payment testing.
server/models/QRCode.js: Mongoose schema for restaurant table QR codes, storing references to restaurants, table numbers, QR code data, payment URLs, and encryption keys, with methods to record scans and retrieve active codes by restaurant or encryption key.
server/routes/qrCodeRoutes.js: Express router for QR code management endpoints, providing authenticated routes to generate, retrieve, regenerate, and delete QR codes for restaurant tables with validation and error handling.
server/scripts/generateTestQRCodes.js: Utility script that generates QR codes for all tables of the most recent restaurant owned by the latest user, using the qrCodeService to create payment URLs for each table.
server/scripts/testQRCodeAPI.js: Test suite script for QR code service functionality, validating QR code generation, retrieval, deletion, and regeneration operations with authorization and validation checks.
server/services/qrCodeService.js: Service module for QR code management in restaurants, providing functions to generate, retrieve, delete, and regenerate QR codes for restaurant tables with ownership verification and encryption key generation.
server/scripts/createBillsForAllRestaura: Database seeding script that generates test bills for all active restaurants with randomized menu items, quantities, and pricing calculations.
server/scripts/createBillsForQRTables.js: Database seeding script that generates test bills for all QR code tables in a restaurant, populating each with random menu items and calculating totals including tax.
server/scripts/enableTestPayments.js: Database migration script that enables test Stripe payment processing for all active restaurants by populating mock Stripe Connect credentials and account status fields.
server/models/Receipt.js: Mongoose schema for Receipt documents with payment tracking, itemization, email delivery status, and fiscal compliance; exports static method generateReceiptNumber() and instance methods markEmailSent(), markFiscalized(), and getSummary().
server/routes/receiptRoutes.js: Express router for receipt management endpoints, providing functionality to generate receipts, send/resend receipt emails, retrieve receipts by ID/number/payment ID, and fetch restaurant receipt data with statistics and filtering options.
server/scripts/testReceiptEndToEnd.js: End-to-end test script for the receipt system that validates receipt generation, retrieval, email delivery, and statistics functionality against a MongoDB database using the receiptService.
server/scripts/testReceiptGeneration.js: Test script for receipt generation workflow that validates payment retrieval, receipt creation via receiptService, and email delivery functionality against a MongoDB database.
server/services/emailService.js: Email service for sending transactional receipts via Nodemailer, exporting methods sendReceiptEmail, generateReceiptEmailHTML, generateReceiptEmailText, formatPaymentMethod, and verifyConnection with support for multiple payment methods and fallback test mode.
server/services/receiptService.js: Service module for receipt management, exporting functions to generate receipts from payments, send receipt emails, retrieve receipts by ID/number/payment, fetch restaurant receipts with filtering, resend emails, and calculate receipt statistics.
server/routes/dashboardRoutes.js: Express router for dashboard analytics endpoints, providing authenticated access to summary statistics, daily/monthly revenue reports, and filtered transaction history for restaurant management.
server/scripts/seedDashboardTestData.js: Database seeding script that generates 60 days of realistic bill and payment transaction data for dashboard testing, including menu items, tips, and payment methods across multiple daily transactions.
server/services/dashboardService.js: Backend service module providing restaurant dashboard analytics functions including daily/monthly revenue calculations, transaction history retrieval with filtering, and summary statistics. Exports getDailyRevenue, getMonthlyRevenue, getTransactionHistory, and getDashboardSummary.
server/scripts/setupTestUserAndData.js: Initialization script that creates a test user account and generates 60 days of realistic transaction data (bills and payments) for a restaurant, including menu items, table assignments, and revenue analytics.
server/server/scripts/fixUserRestaurantL: Database migration script that establishes the relationship between a test user and their associated restaurant by updating the user document with a restaurant reference.
.qa-test-summary.txt: QA test summary report for the Scan&Pay application documenting automated end-to-end testing results, including 15 passing tests, API endpoint verification, performance metrics, and production readiness assessment.
FIX_DOCUMENTATION.md: Documentation of a Radix UI Select component bug fix in RestaurantDashboard.tsx, detailing the root cause (empty string values), solution implementation (replacing with "all" values), code changes across state initialization and filter logic, testing results, and impact assessment.
QA_TESTING_SUMMARY.md: Executive summary document for the Scan&Pay application QA testing, detailing test execution results, feature coverage, API endpoint validation, user journey verification, and production readiness assessment with 100% test pass rate across 20 test cases.
QA_TEST_EXECUTION_LOG.md: Comprehensive automated end-to-end test execution log for Scan&Pay payment system, documenting 15 test cases across 6 pages with API validation, performance metrics, and security observations—all tests passed with 100% success rate and zero issues found.
QA_TEST_REPORT.md: Comprehensive QA test report for the Scan&Pay application documenting test results across payment flow, split bill functionality, tip selection, API endpoints, dashboard, restaurant authentication, and UI/UX with all tests passing and no critical issues detected.
README_QA_TESTING.md: Quick reference guide for QA testing of the Scan&Pay application, summarizing test results (15/15 passed), tested features, performance metrics, and links to detailed documentation files (QA_TEST_REPORT.md, QA_TESTING_SUMMARY.md, QA_TEST_EXECUTION_LOG.md).
test-login.js: Test utility script that registers a new user via the authentication API and logs the returned token, user ID, and restaurant ID for dashboard testing purposes.
API_DOCUMENTATION.md: Complete API reference for the QuickPay payment system, documenting authentication, restaurant management, billing, payments, receipts, QR codes, dashboard, and Stripe Connect endpoints with request/response examples and error handling.
CHANGELOG.md: Version history and release notes for QuickPay restaurant payment system, documenting v1.0.0 initial release with complete feature set including QR code payments, split billing, Stripe integration, restaurant dashboard, and analytics.
DEPLOYMENT.md: Comprehensive deployment guide for QuickPay covering pre-deployment checklist, environment setup (MongoDB Atlas, Stripe, email services), and four deployment options (Heroku, DigitalOcean/AWS/VPS, Vercel+Railway, Docker) with post-deployment verification, monitoring, security hardening, troubleshooting, maintenance, and scaling strategies.
EXPORT_SUMMARY.md: Comprehensive export summary document for QuickPay restaurant payment application, containing project overview, complete file structure, verification checklist, quick start guide, feature inventory, deployment options, and post-export implementation roadmap.
INDEX.md: Central navigation hub for QuickPay documentation, providing organized reading paths for different user roles (developers, project managers, QA testers), quick start instructions, topic-based guides, keyword search functionality, and links to all 11 documentation files covering architecture, deployment, API reference, and testing.
PROJECT_EXPORT.md: Comprehensive project documentation for QuickPay (Scan & Pay), a restaurant payment application featuring complete setup instructions, API endpoint specifications, database models, deployment guides, and QA testing results across frontend React/Vite, backend Express/Node.js, and MongoDB stack.
README.md: Project documentation for QuickPay, a QR code-based restaurant payment system built with React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Stripe—includes architecture overview, quick start guide, API endpoints, testing procedures, deployment instructions, and feature roadmap.
server/.env.example: Environment configuration template for server setup, defining PORT, MongoDB connection, JWT secrets, Stripe API keys, and email SMTP credentials with development guidelines.
client/src/components/ImpactCards.tsx: Animated impact cards section component showcasing key metrics with count-up animations, intersection observer triggers, and staggered fade-in effects; exports ImpactCard and ImpactCards components.
client/src/components/GuestBenefitsCards: React component displaying animated benefit cards for guests with character-reveal text animations and intersection observer triggers, exporting GuestBenefitsCards and BenefitCard subcomponent.
